playbook.intent: One canonical asset (long-form post, podcast episode, or webinar) gets distributed as 10+ derivative units across owned/earned/paid surfaces within one work cycle, with measurable reach per channel
playbook.scope: One canonical asset (long-form post, podcast episode, or webinar) gets distributed as 10+ derivative units across owned/earned/paid surfaces within one work cycle, with measurable reach per channel

success-criteria.criterion: Compound thesis + signal documented before any cycle runs
3+ consecutive cycles executed at the agreed cadence
Signal trajectory shows the discipline is paying off (or audit kills it)
Scaffold + cadence promoted into the official ops doc, owner trained

stage.name: Hypothesis
stage.intent: State the compound discipline you want to install and why it compounds.

tasks.task: Write the explicit thesis: what compounding behaviour you are installing
List the prior interventions this builds on
Set a measurable signal that says the discipline is taking hold

stage.decision-gate: Advance only with a written compound thesis and signal.

stage.name: Scaffolding
stage.intent: Set up the templates, dashboards, and rituals before any output.

tasks.task: Build the template/ledger/dashboard once
Define the cadence (daily / weekly / per-event)
Pre-stage the inputs you will need each cycle

stage.decision-gate: Advance only after the scaffold survives a dry-run cycle.

stage.name: First cycle
stage.intent: Run the first cycle exactly as specified; capture friction without fixing it yet.

tasks.task: Run the cycle end-to-end without optimising
Capture every friction point in the ledger
Resist the urge to redesign the scaffold mid-cycle

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when the cycle produced its intended output, even if ugly.

stage.name: Reduce friction
stage.intent: Fix the top 3 friction points so the next cycle is faster, not just cleaner.

tasks.task: Rank friction points by cost per cycle
Fix the top 3; leave the rest documented
Update the scaffold templates with the fixes

stage.decision-gate: Advance only after each fix has a 'why this saves time per cycle' rationale.

stage.name: Repeat
stage.intent: Run cycles back-to-back to prove the discipline compounds, not just executes once.

tasks.task: Run 3-5 cycles in a row at the agreed cadence
Track output + friction + signal each cycle
Do not skip cycles to make the dashboard look good

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when 3+ consecutive cycles show the signal moving the right way.

stage.name: Audit
stage.intent: Step outside the cadence and ask: is this discipline actually paying off?

tasks.task: Compare signal trajectory vs the hypothesis
Interview anyone running cycles for what's still painful
Write the verdict: keep / change / kill the discipline

stage.decision-gate: Required output: a written verdict, never "let's keep going and reassess".

stage.name: Institutionalize
stage.intent: If the discipline pays off, embed it so it survives founder/team turnover.

tasks.task: Promote scaffold + cadence into the official ops doc
Train the next owner to run it from the doc alone
Add the metric to the rolling team review

outputs.output: Discipline lives in the ops doc + review

stage.decision-gate: Advance only after the next owner runs one full cycle solo.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content synthesis-ship-one-piece-of-content-into-10-channels-with-ai-assisted-atomizatio --format md, agent: faion get-content synthesis-ship-one-piece-of-content-into-10-channels-with-ai-assisted-atomizatio --format context, json: faion get-content synthesis-ship-one-piece-of-content-into-10-channels-with-ai-assisted-atomizatio --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial v2 playbook from F-059-063 chunk-09.}]
